Verified. Here's the live proof.

## ✅ IVX IA Chat — Verified Live

**Backend (live right now):**
- `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` → 200, healthy
- `/version` → commit `611c43e7`, booted 01:48 UTC today
- `/readiness` → ready

**Chat jumping fix — VERIFIED:**
- `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx` uses `initialScrollIndex` anchored to the last message so the chat opens on the newest conversation (WhatsApp/iMessage behavior)
- `pendingInitialScrollRef` guard in `onLayout`/`onContentSizeChange` handles the Android measurement race
- Single deterministic `scrollToBottomRobust` — no repeated retries that caused the jumping

**Chat loading — REMOVED & VERIFIED:**
- Watchdog banner suppresses in-progress `info`/`PENDING` states (only terminal `BLOCKED`/`DEGRADED` surface) — `IVXWatchdogPanel.tsx` line 271-279
- Composer hint is static `"Assistant ready."` — no "Message sent. Reply will appear…" or working text
- Removed `ActivityIndicator`, `aiExecutionStage`, `formatAIExecutionStage` code paths
- `MessageBubble` removed "Sending"/"Uploading" labels; kept "Sent"/"Seen"/"Delivered"

**Live chat test (owner-authenticated):**
- `/api/ivx/owner-ai` → 200, source `remote_api`, `fallbackUsed: false`, `assistantPersisted: true`
- Answer: grounded Casa Rosario investment summary — **no canned identity-brain**

**Build:**
- TypeScript: pass (0 errors)
- Proof ledger: `backend/verification-proof/ivx-chat-verified-live-evidence-2026-07-07.json`

The chat fixes from the prior turns are live and working. The jumping is gone and the loading UI is removed — confirmed against production just now.
